comments.body: FORCE_CLAIM: plan-review gate bypassed by user approval — no plan-review attestation was verified. Reason: "plan-review PASSED (signed, non-blocking) at origin/main 81a15f4d minutes ago; attestation staled only by this stack's own unrelated c366 commit advancing HEAD to 37ab727 (mechanical HEAD-freshness, not a plan change/BLOCK). Gate intent satisfied; claiming all before further commits.".

compiled_state.description:
## Why

Three verify flags default to True and are documented as already operator-authorized
on field evidence, with their `false` value being only a "back-out": `progressive_drift_refresh`,
`remediation_mode`, `novelty_drop_active`. Keeping an off-switch for settled behavior
is config debt. Make all three always-on and delete the off switch.

## What

For each flag: delete the field + validator from `VerifyConfig`, delete the
`if not <flag>: return/None` back-out branch, and hardcode the enabled path.

- `progressive_drift_refresh` (`_config_schema.py:251`): reader `_progressive_enabled`
  (`llm/plan_review/__init__.py:68-75`), gate at `:490-497`. Inline the `drift_refresh`
  call under the existing `if sign` guard.
- `remediation_mode` (`:265`): reader `_remediation_decision` (`__init__.py:79-95`),
  drop the `if not …remediation_mode: return None` at `:92`.
- `novelty_drop_active` (`:284`): TWO readers (shared plan + code review):
  `_maybe_apply_rising_floor` (`__init__.py:206`) and `apply_region_gated_floor`
  (`code_review/workflow_ops.py:609`). Drop both `if not …: return` guards.

## Scope

KEEP (independent tuning params, NOT orphaned — verify they still parse/apply):
`remediation_window_minutes`, `novelty_drop_threshold`, `novelty_priority_floor`.
KEEP the config-unreadable try/except fail-safes and the self-gates (no-prior-memory,
`if sign`) — they provide conservative behavior orthogonal to the removed operator
switch. Do NOT touch the separate `completion_*` keys.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The three flags removed from schema + parser + `rebar.toml` (none currently set there, so verify no stragglers).
- [ ] Each back-out branch deleted; enabled path hardcoded; the three retained tuning params still parse and drive the drop math.
- [ ] False-path tests removed/rewritten (`test_plan_review_gate.py`, `test_plan_review_remediation_gate.py`, `test_plan_review_convergence.py`, `test_code_review_region_gate.py`, `test_plan_review_rising_floor.py`); default-True assertions dropped.
- [ ] `make lint && make typecheck && make test` pass.
compiled_state.title: Make the three settled verify defaults always-on (remove off switches)
